body:
Here are **reliable same-day garage door repair options serving Pleasanton, CA** :

### ⚡ Same-day garage door repair near Pleasanton

**Valiant Garage Door**  
Offers same-day garage door repair in Pleasanton and nearby East Bay cities, including broken springs, opener failures, cable issues, and off-track doors. Technicians are locally based and often complete repairs in a single visit when parts are available. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)  
📞 (925) 409-4974

* * *

**Precision Garage Door Service of East Bay**  
Provides same-day appointments in Pleasanton with fully stocked trucks to handle most repairs on the first visit. They service springs, openers, cables, and full door systems and offer extended hours (including evenings and weekends). [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)  
📞 (925) 268-9267

* * *

**Same Day Garage Door Repair**  
Bay Area-wide emergency service with technicians available 24/7 and same-day response across Pleasanton. Common services include spring replacement, opener repair, and emergency stuck-door fixes. [Same Day Garage Door Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Service](https://www.samedaygd.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)  
📞 (925) 288-8368 (Pleasanton line)

* * *

**Silver Door Garage Door Specialists**  
Offers 24/7 emergency garage door repair in Pleasanton with same-day availability and free estimates. They handle springs, openers, track issues, and full replacements. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Silver Door Garage Door Specialists](https://silverdoorgaragedoordublin.com/service-areas/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)  
📞 (925) 578-2873

* * *

### 💡 Quick advice

  * If your **spring snapped or door won’t open** , call one of the first two—those are typically fastest for dispatch.

  * For **after-hours emergencies** , the 24/7 services are the safest bet.

  * Ask for **“same-day availability + fully stocked truck”** when you call—that’s what determines whether it’s fixed today.

If you want, tell me what’s wrong with your door (won’t open, loud bang, off-track, etc.), and I can narrow down which company is most likely to fix it fastest and cheapest.
